text: Hello. Hello. Who are you? Hi. This is Nancy with U.S. Medical Supplies. I hope I caught you at a good time. Who are you? I'm calling about the continuous glucose monitor. It lets you track your blood sugar without pricking your finger. Ah. Do you have diabetes? Yes, I can. I don't know. Sorry. I didn't catch that. Just a simple yes or no. Ah. Do you currently have diabetes? You already. Okay. Yeah. Bye. Bye. Bye. Bye.
